toast.copy_fail: Copy failed. Please check browser permissions.
toast.resynth_not_found: No resynthesis target found, or LLM output did not match the expected format. Try again or edit the markdown directly.
toast.resynth_rate_limit: Too many requests. Please try again later. {detail}
toast.save_conflict: This document was changed elsewhere (another device or background processing). Review the latest content and try again.
toast.remote_busy: This project is being processed on another device or tab. Please try again after it finishes.

confirm.large_delete:
⚠️ {pct}% ({deleted} chars) of the CPS will be deleted.

Accumulated Problem/Solution data may be lost.
Click OK if this is intentional.

nav.context_hint: See the full Context in the viewer on the right.

download_title: Download CPS markdown (.md) — for Cursor · Notion · repo
tab_locked: Tabs are locked while editing. Save or cancel first.

stale.title: Graph nodes were updated but the markdown is still outdated.
stale.sub: Choose auto-resynthesize (LLM, 5–15 sec) or edit the markdown directly.

edit_scope.section_hint: Other sections will be preserved when you save.
edit_scope.full_hint: Section parsing failed — editing the full markdown directly.

placeholder.full: Edit the full CPS markdown directly...

compliance.desc: All requirements in this spec are 100% mapped. Convert them to engineering rules instantly with Rule Generator.
